brand_identity.name: EcoLens
brand_identity.mission: Connecting people with nature through technology and action.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold shadow-lg transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-[1.5rem] border border-stone-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/20 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: rounded-xl border-stone-200 bg-stone-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all p-4

navigation.wrapper: sticky top-4 z-50 mx-auto max-w-7xl px-4
navigation.container: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-stone-200/50 shadow-sm rounded-full px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-between

landing_page.hero: Full height (min-h-[80vh]) with large organic typography. Image on right or background with overlay.
landing_page.features: Bento grid layout (Gridcols-3) showcasing the 5 main tabs.
landing_page.cta: Centered, high contrast, gentle floating animation.

dashboard.structure: Top navigation bar (no sidebar to keep it airy). Content contained in max-w-7xl.
dashboard.grid: Responsive grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) with generous gaps (gap-6 md:gap-8).

plant_detection.upload_zone: Border-dashed border-2 border-primary/30 bg-primary/5 rounded-3xl h-64 flex flex-col items-center justify-center hover:bg-primary/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer relative overflow-hidden
plant_detection.result_card: Split layout: Image on left, Analysis on right. Use progress bars for 'Health Score'.

climate_map.map_container: rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-inner border border-stone-200 h-[600px] w-full relative
climate_map.overlay_card: absolute top-4 right-4 w-80 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md p-4 rounded-2xl shadow-lg

events_page.card_style: Image top (aspect-video), Content bottom. Date badge floating on image.
events_page.calendar_view: Clean, minimalistic grid. Current day highlighted with primary circle.

eco_points.leaderboard: List view with 'Gold', 'Silver', 'Bronze' highlighting. Avatars strictly circular.
eco_points.progress_circle: Use SVG circles with stroke-dasharray for animated point accumulation.

farmer_guide.layout: Accordion style for FAQs/Tips. Clean typography is crucial here. Use icons to categorize (Pest, Soil, Crop).

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons. Use Lucide icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
